narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: The AI trade is expanding from GPU dominance into a broader networking and high-speed memory supercycle.

narratives.name: China Geopolitical Shifts
narratives.thesis: Anticipation of diplomatic engagement and potential trade deals between the US and China is driving a rally in China-exposed equities.

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: Clinical breakthroughs in oral weight-loss medications are driving sustained momentum in the pharmaceutical sector.

narratives.name: Resurgent Inflation Volatility
narratives.thesis: Sticky retail data and rising energy costs are fueling fears that inflation will remain elevated, pressuring growth and bonds.

narratives.name: Consumer Value Rotation
narratives.thesis: Economic pressure is creating a divide between resilient value-oriented retailers and struggling mid-tier consumer discretionary names.
triggers: Stronger retail earnings for value players

narratives.name: Geopolitical Energy Tensions
narratives.thesis: Geopolitical instability in key shipping lanes and energy-producing regions continues to support energy sector momentum.
